title: Before AAP defections, two-thirds of TDP’s Rajya Sabha MPs joined BJP in 2019, here is how it played out
description: The last time it happened was in 2019 when four of six Rajya Sabha members of Telugu Desam Party (TDP) defected to the BJP. They were former Union Minister YS Chowdary, CM Ramesh, TG Venkatesh and Garikapati Mohan Rao.
